name: Single filer at low income
description: Low earner at €30,000 in Spain - below Social Security max base

sources.description: Verified using Python script implementing official IRPF calculation per Ley 35/2006
sources.verification_method: Python script verify_es_2026.py implementing tax credit method per Ley 35/2006 Articles 56-57
sources.notes: IRPF: Tax on (Gross - SS) minus tax on mínimo personal €5,550. SS: 6.50% = €1,950. Tax credit: €1,054.50. CORRECTED 2026-03-07: Personal allowance now correctly applied as tax credit (not deduction from taxable income).
